BaseField.Name: Label39
BaseField.Text: Visit the Forest Practices Forms and Applications page for more information on forest practices applications and forms.

BaseField.Name: Label181
BaseField.Text: Instructions: To upload documentation, select the document type and then select the upload button below. View documentation by selecting the View Documentation button.

BaseField.Name: Label55
BaseField.Text: Select the Landowner type you want to add.*

BaseField.Name: btnHelpLandownerBusinessOrIndividual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Is the landowner a business or an Individual

BaseField.Name: Landowner Individual Instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a Landowner to your application.

BaseField.Name: btnHelpLandownerBusinessSearch
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Is the landowner a business or an Individual

BaseField.Name: Landowner Business Search Business ID Number
Landowner Business Search Postal Zip Code
Landowner Business Instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a Landowner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Label336
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: btnHelpLandownerSearch
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Is the landowner a business or an Individual

BaseField.Name: DG Landowners
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False'

BaseField.Name: DG Landowner Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Landowners Signers
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Landowner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: Label193
BaseField.Text: Select the Timber Owner type you want to add.*

BaseField.Name: btnHelpTimberOwnerBusinessIndividual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: Timber Owner Business Name

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Individual instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a Timber Owner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Business Search Business Name
Timber Owner Business Search Business ID NumberTimber Owner Business Search Business ID Number
Timber Owner Business Search Postal Zip Code
Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 1
Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 2
Timber Owner Business Search Address Line 3
Timber Owner Business Search Province State
Timber Owner business instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a Timber Owner to your application.

BaseField.Name: Label335
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: Timber Owner Search Postal Zip Code
DG Timber Owners
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False'

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owner Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Timber Owners Signers
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Timber Owner] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: Label195
BaseField.Text: Select the Operator type you want to add.*

BaseField.Name: btnHelpOperatorBusinessOrIndividual
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: New Timber Owner Business Name

BaseField.Name: Operator Individual Instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a Operator to your application.

BaseField.Name: btnHelpOperatorBusinessSearch
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: New Timber Owner Information

BaseField.Name: Operator Business Search Business ID Number
Operator Business Search Postal Zip Code
Operator Business Instructions lbl
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a Operator to your application.

BaseField.Name: Label334
BaseField.Text: Instructions: Search for a contact below to add a business signer to your application.

BaseField.Name: btnHelpOperatorSearch
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: New Timber Owner Information

BaseField.Name: DG Operators
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'False'

BaseField.Name: DG Operator Businesses
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Operators Signers
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Operator] = 'True' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Contact Information Relation].[Business Signer] = 'True'

BaseField.Name: First Name Contact Person
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: First Name Contact Person Required Field

BaseField.Name: Last Name Contact Person
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Last Name Contact Person Required field

BaseField.Name: btnHelpContactPerson
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: New Timber Owner Information

BaseField.Name: Label212
BaseField.Text: 2. Describe the proposed amendment to the approved FPA/N

BaseField.Name: Label208
BaseField.Text: You can upload additional documentation, or give specific details below. Upload a new Activity Map if you are proposing any changes to the original. *

BaseField.Name: btnHelpProposedAmendment
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: New Timber Owner Information

BaseField.Name: Describe the proposed amendment to the approved FPAN
btnHelpSignatures
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Quick Help: New Timber Owner Information

BaseField.Name: Label441
BaseField.Text: • The information on this application/notification amendment is true.

BaseField.Name: Label442
BaseField.Text: • We understand this proposed forest practice is subject to:

BaseField.Name: Label214
BaseField.Text: • The Forest Practices Act and Rules, AND

BaseField.Name: Label215
BaseField.Text: • All other federal, state or local regulations.

BaseField.Name: Label445
BaseField.Text: • Compliance with the Forest Practices act and Rules does not ensure compliance with the Endangered Species Act or other federal, state or local laws

BaseField.Name: Label446
BaseField.Text: • I understand that this amendment is a request for Notice to Comply for an authorized deviation as described in WAC 222-20-060

BaseField.Name: Label220
BaseField.Text: *NOTE: If you are a "Perpetual Timber Rights Owner", and are submitting this without the landowner's signature, provide written evidence the landowner has been notified.

BaseField.Name: Label287
BaseField.Text: You can manage your submitted application by selecting one of the following actions.

BaseField.Name: Label288
BaseField.Text: • Withdrawal Request: Request to withdraw or close your application.

BaseField.Name: Label43
BaseField.Text: Instructions: This section is only visible to VaultAccess users. Check Administrator Override to remove read-only configurations and show all fields. Select Admin Save to save any changes without applying business rules. Remember to uncheck override and save before closing.

Group.GroupName: Show Manage Tab Content Office Staff
Show Timber Owner Business Signer Labels

FormScriptItem.Script:
const destinationURL = `${VV.BaseURL}ReportViewer?rpid=d6413c96-8032-f011-82dc-c4855cbaa12f&formId=${VV.Form.DhDocID}`;
window.open(destinationURL, "_blank");

FormScriptItem.Name: AddContact
FormScriptItem.Arguments: contactId, selectedContactFirstName, selectedContactLastName, roles, businessId, isBusinessSigner

SendForSignature
SaveForm

SaveDraft

btnHelpContactPerson_onClick

btn_ViewDocumentation_onClick
btnClose1_onClick

FormScriptItem.Name: Region_Project_Information_onChange
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.Template.UpdateDocumentPath();

FormScriptItem.Name: btnHelpLandownerSearch_onClick
btn_SendForSignature_onClick
btnHelpLandownerBusinessSearch_onClick
btn_SaveDraft_onClick

FormScriptItem.Name: btnTabMain_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.SetFieldValue('Tab Control', 'Main', true);

FormScriptItem.Name: btnAdminSave_onClick
FormScriptItem.Script: VV.Form.DoAjaxFormSave();

btn_RemoveSelectedOperators_onClick
